hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "wrangler (deploy|publish)" && echo "[hook] REMINDER: Verify contracts and run build before deploying TCVLP Worker" || true'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "workers/src/" && echo "[hook] Worker file modified — verify endpoint matches contracts in /contracts/" || true'
